title: Breadgang RE:BAKED
description:
[Discontunued] Breadgang: Rebaked Modpack for 1.20.1,
Now Public!
body:
# **Breadgang: Re-Baked**

**Breadgang, Re-Baked** is our modpack for the BreadGang group, made public! 

We include a multitude of mods, with the main focus of this server the time around being the **Origins Mod**, and tons of new mods alongside some of our classic favorites such as: 
- Create
- FancyMenu
- Artifacts
- Croptopia
- The Essential Mod
- And much more!

Atleast 5GB of memory is recommended, but can run on 2gb
![settings!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d23cc9c38c4f14cd92644b77430959d1d4052c9a.png)
Change your memory via this slider in modrinth profile options!


## Balancing
This is meant to be a **balanced** modpack, which is more fun if played on an SMP!
Netherite, Overpowered Armor, and certain origins are disabled!


__The Official Server is **PRIVATE**, You can only join if invited! (No asking for invites!)__



> Credits to Spacular/Faded for the logo!
